title: MapReduce - src/main/java/Mapper.java
description: The Mapper class is responsible for transforming input records into intermediate records. The map() method is the core logic of the Mapper class, where input key/value pairs are transformed into intermediate key/value pairs. The Mapper takes input key/value pairs and produces intermediate key/value pairs as output. The Mapper class depends on the MapContext interface, which provides access to the input data and allows the Mapper to write output.

DESCRIPTION:
The Mapper class is responsible for transforming input records into intermediate records. The map() method is the core logic of the Mapper class, where input key/value pairs are transformed into intermediate key/value pairs. The Mapper takes input key/value pairs and produces intermediate key/value pairs as output. The Mapper class depends on the MapContext interface, which provides access to the input data and allows the Mapper to write output.
